description: A warehouse manager needs to perform a cycle count for a specific section of the warehouse to ensure inventory accuracy.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of products and their expected quantities for a specific warehouse aisle.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the list of SKUs and their system quantities for 'Aisle 5'.

nodes.task_description: Record the actual physical counts for each product provided by the warehouse staff.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent inputs the physically counted numbers.

nodes.task_description: Compare the system count to the physical count and flag any discrepancies for investigation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a discrepancy report highlighting items that need investigation.
